

# **Sprint Report 2- Cs Life** 

# Team Name: BitByte 

### Members: Marco Nasirpour, Nima Jamshidi, 

Adrian Lopez, Ethan Zarella,   
Saniha Sreedhara 

### Release 1.0, Release Date: 7/7/2026

### Revision: N/A, Revision Date: N/A 

**Actions to stop doing:**

The team should keep the scrum meetings to 15 minutes or less. Some of the previous meetings lasted up to 45 minutes long, which defeats the purpose of having a short update meeting to see everyone’s progress. 

**Actions to start doing:**

The team needs to start describing their events and accomplishments more briefly due to the long meeting times that are unnecessary. The team needs to also be more accurate with the user story points, specifically with the time estimations of each task. 

**Actions to keep doing:**

We need to continue with our clear and concise communication as we have been very efficient and progressing very well. We also need to keep up the good work as everyone has been up to date and focused on their given tasks. 

**Work Completed / Not Completed:**

* Completed User Stories:  
  * As a player, I want to start a new game in which I can choose my name and starting stats  
  * As a player I want to be able to progress through quarters  
  * As a user, I want my progression to be saved  
* Not Completed User Stories:  
  * As a player, I want the ability to view my character’s stats (partially completed)  
    * Task “Update character statistics based on decisions/performance” not complete because decisions not fully implemented yet.  
    * Team decided to push this task to sprint 3

**Work Completion Rate:**

* Total number of user stories completed: 3 (US-1, US-3, US-4)  
* Total number of ideal work hours: 14+16+12 \= 42 hours total  
* Total number of days during Sprint 2: 7 days (Wednesday July 1st \- Tuesday July 7th)  
* User stories per day:  3 / 7   
* Ideal work hours/days \= 42 / 7 \= 6 hours per day  
* Work Completion Rate (Sprints 1 \- 2\)  
  * Average user stories/ day across sprint: 5 / 14 \= 0.357 user stories per day  
  * Average ideal work hours/day: 48 / 14 \= 3.429 OR 3 hours and 26 minutes per day  
* Final Sprint 2 Burn up-chart
